TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kalibuan = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Kalibuan. 191 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 692 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 632 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 60 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 86%, Tayal 1%, Amis 2%, Cou 12%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = kalibuan = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ kalibuan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *%, amis *%, ʦou **%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Kalibuan = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Kalibuan. 191 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 692 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 632 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 60 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 86%, Tayal 1%, Amis 2%, Cou 12%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = kalibuan = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ kalibuan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *%, amis *%, ʦou **%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
